title: German Grill Gelatin Salad
description: A refreshing German-inspired gelatin salad made with a rich and buttery flavor, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Dissolve the gelatin in the water in a small bowl.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the German mustard to the saucepan and whisk until smooth.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the dissolved gelatin mixture.
Add the chopped fresh dill and chives to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and refrigerate until set.
Cut the gelatin salad into squares and serve chilled.
